1. AND Gate.desc: Output is High only if both inputs are High.

2. OR Gate.desc: Output is High if at least one input is High.

3. NOT Gate.desc: Output is the logical inversion of the input.

4. NAND Gate.desc: Output is Low only if both inputs are High.

5. NOR Gate.desc: Output is High only if all inputs are Low.

6. XOR Gate.desc: Output is High only if inputs are different.

7. XNOR Gate.desc: Output is High only if inputs are identical.

8. Buffer.desc: Passes input to output, strengthening signal drive.

11. Tri-state Buffer.desc: Passes input A when active-high enable EN is true, otherwise high impedance.

12. Half Adder.desc: Half adder computing sum and carry outputs for two input bits.

13. Full Adder.desc: Full adder module with carry-in support.

14. Half Subtractor.desc: Subtracts input b from a to yield difference and borrow out.

15. Full Subtractor.desc: Three-input subtractor yielding difference and borrow.

16. 2:1 Multiplexer.desc: Dataflow multiplexer selecting between inputs i0 and i1 based on sel.

17. 4:1 Multiplexer.desc: Dataflow multiplexer routing one of 4 input lines.

18. 8:1 Multiplexer.desc: Dataflow multiplexer routing one of 8 input lines.

19. 16:1 Multiplexer.desc: Dataflow multiplexer routing one of 16 input lines.

20. 32:1 Multiplexer.desc: Dataflow multiplexer routing one of 32 input lines.

21. 64:1 Multiplexer.desc: Dataflow multiplexer routing one of 64 input lines.

22. 1-to-2 Demultiplexer.desc: Splits 1 input line into 2 output lines.

23. 1-to-4 Demultiplexer.desc: Splits 1 input line into 4 output lines.

24. 1-to-8 Demultiplexer.desc: Splits 1 input line into 8 output lines.

25. 1-to-16 Demultiplexer.desc: Splits 1 input line into 16 output lines.

26. 1-to-32 Demultiplexer.desc: Splits 1 input line into 32 output lines.

27. 2-to-4 Decoder.desc: Translates a 2-bit address into 4 mutual-exclusive lines.

28. 3-to-8 Decoder.desc: Translates a 3-bit address into 8 mutual-exclusive lines.

29. 4-to-16 Decoder.desc: Translates a 4-bit address into 16 mutual-exclusive lines.

30. 5-to-32 Decoder.desc: Translates a 5-bit address into 32 mutual-exclusive lines.

31. 1-bit Binary Adder.desc: Ripple carry adder block of width 1 bits.

32. 2-bit Binary Adder.desc: Ripple carry adder block of width 2 bits.

33. 4-bit Binary Adder.desc: Ripple carry adder block of width 4 bits.

34. 8-bit Binary Adder.desc: Ripple carry adder block of width 8 bits.

35. 16-bit Binary Adder.desc: Ripple carry adder block of width 16 bits.

36. 32-bit Binary Adder.desc: Ripple carry adder block of width 32 bits.

45. Gray to Binary 4-bit.desc: Translates Gray code back to binary.

55. DFF with Clock Enable.desc: Loads data only when clock enable is High.

59. 2-bit Register.desc: Synchronous storage register of 2 bits width.

60. 4-bit Register.desc: Synchronous storage register of 4 bits width.

61. 8-bit Register.desc: Synchronous storage register of 8 bits width.

62. 16-bit Register.desc: Synchronous storage register of 16 bits width.

63. 32-bit Register.desc: Synchronous storage register of 32 bits width.

64. 64-bit Register.desc: Synchronous storage register of 64 bits width.

69. Universal Shift Register.desc: Supports shift operations and parallel load.

75. Mod-6 Counter.desc: Counts 0 to 5 for time minutes/seconds units.

85. Moore 101 Detector (Overlapping).desc: FSM matching sequence pattern 101 in serial inputs.
